title: Foldable Shopping Trolley on Wheels, 25kg Heavy-Duty Waterproof Oxford Fabric Collapsible Bag with Silent Wheels, Convertible Hand Carry (Black)
features: Our space-saving foldable shopping trolley transforms from full-size carrier (41x46cm) to compact 41x32cm bundle in seconds. The innovative dual-fold system collapses both rubber wheels and kickstand neatly, while the center zipper shortens the bag for hand-carry convenience. Perfect for crowded supermarkets and narrow storage spaces

Engineered with tear-resistant 600D Oxford fabric and waterproof lining, this shopping trolley on wheels handles 25kg loads effortlessly. The extra-wide rubber wheels glide quietly across uneven pavements, while the reinforced stitching ensures lasting durability. Never worry about split bags or noisy wheels again

Why choose between dragging and carrying? Our unique shopping trolley features a smart center zipper that instantly converts between full-length wheeled mode (ideal for bulky shops) and compact hand-carry configuration. The foldable shopping trolley adapts to your errand needs - carry vertically or pull horizontally with equal ease

At just 0.35kg, this practical trolley on wheels combines portability with serious functionality. The size of the shopping trolley is only 38cm*15cm*3cm when folded up, it will not take up much space at all

Built for British weather, our shopping trolleys feature waterproof base panels. The elevated kickstand keeps contents dry on wet surfaces, while the ventilated design prevents condensation. Whether it's Christmas groceries or weekly market hauls, this foldable shopping trolley works year-round
description: Foldable Shopping Trolley on Wheels, 25kg Heavy-Duty Waterproof Oxford Fabric Collapsible Bag with Silent Wheels, Convertible Hand Carry
